a-scotsmans-shepherd-pie.name: A Scotsman's Shepherd Pie

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Stir potatoes, sour cream, cream cheese, 1 tablespoon butter, egg yolk, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper together in a bowl until smooth.

Heat olive oil in a cast iron skillet or nonstick pan over medium-high heat. Add ground lamb, reduce heat to medium, and cook, stirring frequently, until browned and crumbly, 4 to 5 minutes. Pour off excess grease and season lamb with salt and black pepper to taste.

Stir tomatoes with juice, onion, and carrot into ground lamb; simmer until vegetables are tender, 5 to 10 minutes. Add peas, reduce heat to low, and cook, stirring frequently, until peas are warmed, 2 to 3 minutes.
Heat beer in a saucepan over medium heat; add beef bouillon. Cook and stir beer mixture until bouillon is dissolved, about 5 minutes.

Heat remaining 1 tablespoon butter in a separate pan over medium-low heat until sizzling. Whisk flour into butter until thick and paste-like, about 1 minute. Stir beer mixture and Worcestershire sauce into flour mixture until gravy is smooth and thickened, 2 to 3 minutes. Stir gravy into lamb mixture and simmer until mixture is thickened, at least 5 minutes.
Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Grease a 9x12-inch baking dish.
Pour lamb mixture into the prepared baking dish. Carefully spoon mashed potatoes over lamb mixture, covering like a crust. Sprinkle Cheddar cheese, parsley, and paprika over mashed potatoes.
Broil in the preheated oven until crust is browned and cheese is melted, 4 to 5 minutes. Cool for about 5 minutes before serving.

abundance-salad-lezzet.name: Abundance Salad
instructions: 1. From the first mind among the Bol-material recipes.
2. Roast sausages.
3. Peel potatoes and peel their shells.
4. Mix all the ingredients of cube grass, except for the cheese that is scraped into a large container.
5. Mayonez add salt with cottage yogurt and cube chopped cheese.
6. Mix and serve well.

ackee-tacos-with-island-guacamole.name: Ackee Tacos With Island Guacamole

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly cracked black pepper to taste
To 3 tablespoons coconut oil or other vegetable oil
Seeded and minced scotch bonnet pepper
Dozen frozen ackee or 2 cans ackee
ingredients.prep: drained (or 2 cups ackee, cooked from fresh)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly cracked black pepper to taste

instructions: Dice or mash the avocado depending on your preference; it can have a more salsa-like texture if preferred. Add the remaining guacamole ingredients, gently stirring to combine. Refrigerate until you are ready to assemble the tacos.

Heat the oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat. Add the onion, tomato, garlic, bell pepper, Scotch bonnet pepper, and scallion, and cook until the ingredients are soft, about 3 minutes. Add the ackee, thyme, chili powder, salt, and pepper, gently folding the ingredients together. Cook for 5 to 8 minutes or until the mixture is heated through; remove from heat.

Serve assembly-line style, with the ackee mixture, guacamole, grated cheese, shredded lettuce or cabbage, cilantro, salsa, and sour
cream (if using) in colorful bowls next to a basket of soft or hard taco shells. Alternately, serve a large platter of already assembled
tacos: fill each shell with a few tablespoons of ackee, layer with lettuce, guacamole, and cheese, and top with a mound of fresh
cilantro for a mouthful of exotic flavor. Serve with salsa and/or sour cream if you wish.

afyon-cream-dessert-lezzet.name: Afyon Cream Dessert
instructions: 1. 1 kilo milk, 3 coffee cups of sugar, 3 coffee cups flour, thoroughly mixed and cooked, 1 pack vanilla, added,  taken from fire.
2. 15 minutes is snapped with mixer.

3. The oven tray is sprinkled with plenty of coconuts, it is spread properly, which is poured into the peek, after which it is 1 water glass of milk, the cream is amazed, the cream on the muhallebine is properly placed.
4. It is sprinkled in nuts.
5. If a night is expected in the ice cabinet, it will not be difficult to fold.
6. When we serve, we are coconut, forged nuts  serpip  we cut the roll shape.

air-fryer-apple-dumplings.name: Air Fryer Apple Dumplings
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 160°C (160 degrees C). Line the air fryer basket with aluminum foil.
Mix raisins and sugar together in a small bowl.

Place 1 puff pastry sheet on a work surface; put one apple in center of pastry. Fill core with 1/2 of the raisin mixture. Fold pastry around apple to fully cover. Repeat with remaining apple, remaining pastry, and remaining 1/2 of the raisin mixture.
Transfer dumplings to the prepared basket; brush with butter.
Cook until pastry is golden and apples are tender, about 25 minutes.

air-fryer-carrots-sweet-spicy.name: Air Fryer Carrots (sweet ' Spicy)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C). Spray the basket with nonstick spray.
Combine butter, honey, orange zest, and cardamom in a bowl. Transfer 1 tablespoon of the sauce to a separate bowl and set aside.
Add carrots to remaining sauce and toss to coat. Place carrots in the air fryer basket.
Cook in the preheated air fryer, tossing every 7 minutes, until carrots are roasted and fork-tender, about 15 to 22 minutes.
Mix orange juice with reserved honey-butter sauce. Toss with cooked carrots until well combined. Season with salt and pepper.

air-fryer-hot-honey-chicken-wings.name: Air Fryer Hot Honey Chicken Wings
instructions: Pat the chicken wings very dry with paper towels. Toss together the wings, oil, salt, baking powder, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, and cayenne in a large bowl until evenly coated.

Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200°C). Arrange the wings in a single layer in the basket (cook in batches if needed). 3. Cook until the wings are golden and crispy, and the internal temperature reaches 74°C,  for 15–20 minutes, flipping the wings halfway through the cook time.

While the wings cook, melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the ginger, garlic and red pepper flakes. Cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in the hot honey, soy sauce, and hot sauce. Bring to a simmer, and cook, stirring occasionally, until bubbling, slightly thickened, and syrupy, 2–3 minutes.
Transfer the cooked wings to a large bowl. Pour the hot honey sauce over the top, and toss until the wings are fully coated.
Pile the wings onto a platter, and serve hot. Garnish with sesame seeds and/or scallions, if desired.
Enjoy!

air-fryer-nutella-mini-turnovers.name: Air Fryer Nutella Mini Turnovers
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Place puff pastry on a very lightly floured surface and roll to a 9x12-inch rectangle. Cut into twelve 3-inch squares with a sharp knife. Place about 1 teaspoon chocolate-hazelnut spread in the center of each square; sprinkle with hazelnuts. Fold each square diagonally to form a triangle.
Whisk together egg and water in a small bowl until well combined. Brush egg wash over the edges of each pastry triangle; press to seal. Arrange turnovers in a single layer in the air fryer basket.
Cook in batches in the preheated air fryer until well browned, 5 to 7 minutes per batch. Cool turnovers on a wire rack.

air-fryer-turkey-meatballs.name: Air Fryer Turkey Meatballs
instructions: Combine panko, Parmesan cheese, pesto, egg, milk, ricotta cheese, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper, and garlic in a large bowl; mix together. Add ground turkey and lightly fold into the mixture--the more you mix the tougher it will be.
Preheat the air fryer to 191°C (190 degrees C) for 5 minutes.
Shape ground turkey mixture into 1-1/2 inch meatballs and place into the air fryer basket.
Cook meatballs in the air fryer until cooked through, 8 to 10 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

algarve-style-lambujinhas-teleculinaria.name: Algarve-style Lambujinhas
instructions: Coloque as lambujinhas numa tigela previamente temperada de sal.
Descasque e lave a cebola e os dentes de alho. Pique-os finamente.
In a pot heat the olive oil. Add the onion and garlic teeth. Let it saute.
Add the licks, sweet pepper, lemon juice, chopped coriander, salt and pepper.
Let them cook until they open. Remove from the fire and serve decorated to taste.

all-american-loaded-baked-potato-salad.name: All-american Loaded Baked Potato Salad
instructions: Place potatoes in a pot and cover with cold water. Add salt and bring to a boil. Simmer until potatoes are just tender enough to be pierced with a fork, about 15 minutes. Drain and run under cold water until potatoes are slightly cool.

Mix sour cream, creamy salad dressing, and ground black pepper together in a large bowl. Stir in Cheddar cheese, green onion, and bacon bits; add potatoes. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.

almond-butter-honey-oat-bars.name: Almond Butter Honey Oat Bars
instructions: In a medium bowl, add oats, nut butter, and honey or maple syrup, and mix until well combined.
Spray baking dish with cooking spray. Pour in mixture and spread evenly.
Cover and place in freezer until firm.
Cut into bars. Keep in the fridge until ready to eat.
Enjoy!

almond-covered-croissant-lezzet.name: Almond Covered Croissant
instructions: 1. Cut the ribs to the top.
2. Mix well with butter and powder sugar mixer in a container.
3. Add the egg white on it and mix again.
4. Finally add the almond flour and then mix 4 (half) cruvasana.
5. Close other cruvasans to their bases.
6. thoroughly cover the fill with almond after smearing the vines into the egg white.
7. Directory to the oven tray that you sprinkle oil paper.
8. Bake until the pre-heated oven to 170 degrees.
9. After cooling, sprinkle the sugar on the powder.
10. You can also try the classic cruvasan recipe, one of the most popular desserts in the world.

and-chickpea-snack-comedera.name: And Chickpea Snack
and-chickpea-snack-comedera.original_name: Snack de garbanzos rápido y fácil
instructions: Preheat the oven at 200ª C
Then, in a bowl, add the cum, thyme, cinnamon, pimenton, olive oil, half light juice, salt and pepper to taste.
Fold now the baked and mixed chickpeas till they are well marinated.
Let's get them to have a good taste for 15 minutes.
Prepare a plate with paper and extend the chickpeas.
Roast and cook for 20 minutes at 200º C
Take out the oven, serve and enjoy tibia.

apple-biscuit-cup-lezzet.name: Apple Biscuit Cup
instructions: 1. Clean the cores by split the apples into 4.
2. Stick the cube by asking the shells.
3. blend with lemon juice for not to be decided.
4. Then transfer apples to a large-based pot.
5. Put the apples you add brunette sugar in the middle fire up to the light color area.
6. Get from the stove by adding cinnamon and vanilla.
7. Take milk, egg yolks and starch in a pot for allebisi.
8. Add dust sugar and cook until it comes to the variance in the middle-heat stove.
9. Take from January, add dust cream schimmer after light brupt, and rub it with the help of the mixer.
10. Hit the biscuits with your hands or from the robot.
11. 11. blend with thin drawn walnut.
12. Share the material by adding one layer of biscuits, one layer of apples.
12. August Share the chopped opponent and biscuits.
14 July Serve after cooling in the refrigerator.

apple-cheesecake-snack-bars.name: Apple Cheesecake Snack Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly butter a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Mix graham cracker crumbs and melted butter together in a bowl until crumbly, adding more crumbs if mixture is too wet. Press crust into the prepared baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and set, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside.

Beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar using an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract on low speed until mixture is blended. Pour filling over warm crust.
Stir apples, 2 tablespoons sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice together in a separate bowl; spoon evenly over filling.
Mix brown sugar, flour, walnuts, and cinnamon for streusel together in a bowl. Mix or cut butter into walnut mixture using your fingers or a knife until crumbly. Sprinkle over apple layer.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese filling is set, 30 to 35 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely, about 30 minutes. Cut into small squares and refrigerate until ready to serve.

apple-cider-marinated-grilled-chicken.name: Apple Cider-marinated Grilled Chicken
instructions: Combine apple cider, apple jelly, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, salt, and pepper in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir just until jelly melts, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let marinade cool to room temperature, about 10 minutes.
Place chicken thighs and marinade into a 1-gallon plastic zip-top bag and let marinate for at least 1 hour.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate. Remove chicken from the bag and discard marinade.

Grill chicken thighs until no longer pink in the centers, turning frequently being careful not to let chicken burn, 20 to 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of a thigh should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

applebrown-sugar-pie.name: Apple–brown Sugar Pie

ingredients.item: Lightly sweetened crème fraîche or whipped cream

instructions: Mix salt and 2¾ cups flour in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with paddle attachment on low speed to combine. Add butter and shortening and beat on medium-low until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Drizzle in ⅓ cup ice water, then beat, adding splashes of ice water as needed, until dough just comes together. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Gently press together and flatten a couple of times, about 30 seconds. Divide dough in half; pat into disks. Wrap in plastic; chill at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 350°. Toss apples, 1 cup granulated sugar, and ¼ cup flour in a large bowl. Divide between 2 rimmed baking sheets; bake, rotating baking sheets once, until apples are just tender, 25–30 minutes. Let cool, then transfer apples and accumulated juices to a large bowl. Add butter, brown sugar, cinnamon, and 1 heaping Tbsp. flour; toss to combine. Chill at least 1 hour.

Let dough sit at room temperature to soften slightly, about 5 minutes. Roll out 1 disk on a lightly floured surface to a 13" round. Transfer to a 9" pie dish. Lift up edges; let dough slump down into dish. Trim, leaving ½" overhang. Roll out remaining disk. Scrape apples into dish and place dough over top; trim, leaving 1" overhang. Fold edge of top crust under bottom crust, press together to seal, and crimp. Cut 8 slits in top to vent, brush with egg, and sprinkle with remaining 2 Tbsp. granulated sugar. Chill pie in freezer until crust is firm, about 30 minutes.

Preheat oven to 400°. Place pie on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet; bake 30 minutes (crust should be slightly golden). Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue baking until juices are bubbling and crust is deep golden brown, 50–60 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool at least 4 hours before slicing. Serve with crème fraîche.
Do Ahead: Roasted apples can be made 1 day ahead; keep chilled.

apricot-crescent-cookies.name: Apricot Crescent Cookies
instructions: {'step_number': 1, 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 190 degrees C.'}
{'step_number': 2, 'description': 'Blend butter, cream cheese, and sour cream together in a large bowl with an electric mixer. Stir in flour, 125g powdered sugar, and salt until well blended.'}
{'step_number': 3, 'description': 'Wrap dough in waxed paper and chill until firm enough to roll, at least 3 hours, or overnight.'}
{'step_number': 4, 'description': 'Divide dough into thirds. Keep dough in the refrigerator while working on one portion at a time.'}
{'step_number': 5, 'description': 'Roll each portion into a 12 1/2x10-inch rectangle.'}
{'step_number': 6, 'description': 'Cut into 2 1/2-inch squares using a fluted pastry wheel.'}
{'step_number': 7, 'description': 'Place a dot, about 1.25g, of preserves in the center of each square.'}
{'step_number': 8, 'description': 'Bring up two diagonal corners to the center, pinching together to seal, or secure with a toothpick.'}
{'step_number': 9, 'description': 'Place on ungreased cookie sheets.'}
{'step_number': 10, 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven until firm, but not brown, about 12 minutes.'}
{'step_number': 11, 'description': 'Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool, 8 to 10 minutes more.'}
{'step_number': 12, 'description': 'Sift remaining powdered sugar over the cooled cookies.'}

apricot-date-bars.name: Apricot-date Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix oats, flour, 1 cup brown sugar, baking soda, and salt together in a large bowl. Stir in butter until mixture is crumbly.
Press a little over half of the crumbly mixture into the bottom of a 10x15-inch baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until starting to brown, 10 to 15 minutes.

Combine remaining 1/2 cup brown sugar, dates, apricots, and orange juice in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cook and stir until thickened, breaking up any clumps, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract. Cool filling slightly, about 5 minutes.
Drop spoonfuls of warm filling over the crust. Spread evenly with an offset spatula. Sprinkle remaining crumbly mixture evenly over the filling; press gently into the filling.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is lightly browned, about 25 minutes. Cut into 1-1/4x2-inch bars with a pastry cutter while still hot. Cool bars in the pan, about 20 minutes.

aprils-spicy-chickpea-soup-with-kale.name: April's Spicy Chickpea Soup With Kale

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil over medium heat in a medium-sized pot until warm. Add cumin seeds and red pepper flakes; cook and stir until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; cook and stir until onion is softened and translucent, about 5 minutes. Stir in chicken broth, chickpeas, and kale.
Bring soup to a simmer and cook until kale is tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Season with salt and pepper; stir in parsley. Remove from heat; top with Parmesan cheese.

artichoke-pate-recipe-with-lemon-comeder.name: Artichoke Pâté Recipe with Lemon
artichoke-pate-recipe-with-lemon-comeder.original_name: Receta de paté de alcachofas con limón

ingredients.item: 4  corazones de alcachofa cocidos (frescos, unos 240 g)
1 cda of freshly squeezed lemon juice
1 ½ cda extra virgin olive oil
1 cda de almendras tostadas o anacardos naturales
2 cds of cream cheese or natural Greek yogurt (optional for smoother texture)
Newly ground black pepper to taste
3  hojas de albahaca fresca o perejil

instructions: If you use fresh artichokes, clear them by withdrawing hard leaves, cut tipples and necks into salt water and a few drops of lemon for 20 to 25 minutes till they are tender. Listen to them very well and let them cool.
If you are using preserved artichokes, rinse them slightly to remove excesses and sepas with absorbing paper.
Coloca los corazones de alcachofa en el vaso de la licuadora o procesador de alimentos.
Add lemon juice and grates, olive oil, garlic, roasted almonds and cream or yogurt cheese if you choose to use them.
Incorpora la sal, pimienta y las hierbas frescas.
It processes for 1 to 2 minutes to get a creamy and homogenous texture. If very thick, add an additional teaspoon of olive oil or a tablespoon of cold water.
Test and adjust acidity, salt or spices as your preferred.
Refrigera al menos 20 minutos antes de servir para que los sabores se integren mejor.

arugula-fig-salad-with-creamy-gorgonzola.name: Arugula-fig Salad With Creamy Gorgonzola

ingredients.item: Sea salt and cracked black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine olive oil, lemon juice, orange blossom water, orange juice, and orange zest in a glass jar and shake dressing until emulsified.
Arrange arugula on a salad platter, place figs on top, then top with Gorgonzola cheese and scatter the crushed pistachios over to garnish.
Season with salt and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad and serve immediately.

avocado-and-black-bean-dip.name: Avocado And Black Bean Dip
instructions: Mix avocado, black beans, lime juice, and garlic together in a microwave-safe bowl. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese.
Microwave dip on high until cheese is melted, about 1 minute. Season with sea salt if desired.

avocado-and-shrimp-salad-teleculinaria.name: Avocado And Shrimp Salad
instructions: Cook the shrimp in salted water, drain and let it cool. Peel the avocado, remove its lump and cut it into slices. Then water it with the lemon juice so it doesn't oxidize. Cut the cheese into small cubes.
Have the lettuce mixture and the arugula in a salad bowl. Put over the cheese, the shrimp and the avocado. Season with balsamic vinegar, oil, salt and oregano. Add some nuts and serve immediately.

awesome-sausage-apple-and-cranberry-stuf.name: Awesome Sausage, Apple, And Cranberry Stuffing
instructions: Spread white and whole wheat bread cubes in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until evenly toasted, 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer toasted bread cubes to a large bowl.

Cook sausage and onions in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring and breaking up lumps, until evenly browned, 6 to 8 minutes. Add celery, sage, rosemary, and thyme; cook and stir until flavors blend, about 2 minutes.
Pour sausage mixture over bread in bowl. Mix in chopped apple, dried cranberries, parsley, and liver. Drizzle with turkey stock and melted butter; mix lightly.
Allow stuffing to cool completely before loosely stuffing a turkey.
